name: The lord of the Mysteries RPG
description:
Honestly I don't even know where to begin. I think LOTM has some of the most extraordinary worldbuilding I've ever seen in any piece of fiction. Comparable to Tolkien in my opinion. The lore is so rich and so extensive that i couldn't even fit all of it in. But i tried to fit as much as I could to provide the most immersive experience possible. So yeah. Anyway here's some basics to get you started:

In this world magic comes in the form of potions called pathways. There are 22 pathways. Each is divided into levels called sequences. There are 9 sequences for each pathway. The lower the sequence, the more powerful you are. Those who gain these powers are called Beyonders. Here's the magic system:

To get these powers you need to join a church or secret order. Here are the main ones:

1.THE CHURCH OF THE EVERIGHT GODDESS:

The church of the Evernight Goddess

Main article: Church of the Evernight Goddess

Officially founded after the Cataclysm at the end of the Third Epoch, but had existed earlier as one of the earliest Secret Organizations.[1][2] After The Apocalypse, merged with the Church of the God of Combat and the Church of the Death to form the Church of the Eternal Darkness.

The Nighthawks is a division of Beyonders under the Church of the Evernight Goddess. they usually act undercover as law enforcement or security companie. They address supernatural issues related to believers of the Evernight Goddess.

2.THE CHURCH OF THE GOD OF STEAM AND MACHINERY:

The Church of the God of Steam and Machinery was officially founded in the late Fourth Epoch. This organization is in control of the Paragon Pathway and is one of the Eight Orthodox Churches. Along with the Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun, they are influential throughout the Intis Republic. The Church is also one of the main religions in the Loen Kingdom, along with the Church of the Evernight Goddess and the Church of the Lord of Storms. But after the 1350 World War, their influence in the kingdom was limited because they were on the Intis side that lost the war.Characteristics

The Church of the God of Steam and Machinery's cathedrals have intricate machinery[9] and will emit an iron-black chimney to form their Guardian Angel from smoke in case of emergency. The Church of the God of Steam and Machinery values marriage,[10] regarding gender equality, the Church is neutral and has even worked with the Church of the Evernight Goddess to encourage women to head out for work due to the need for more labour in the development of the industry.The Church's clergyman's attire is a white apron wrapped around their waist, a typical garment worn by ancient stonemasons, and a robe with a hood. Fanatical devotion to machinery was their hallmark. They don't hesitate to mechanize a quarter of their body to an excessive extent.Their fighting style consists of using powerful Beyonder weapons and sealed artifacts due to the church's abundance of Artisans and other craftsmen.

3.THE CHURCH OF THE LORD OF STORMS:
